item.title: Random Funny Vid n Memes Dump
item.description:
1 If you laughed, I’ll see you down there
2 Haven’t posted in a while, so I hope you enjoy!
3 I’ve been having a rough time lately
4 and I’m doing the best I can
5 with the hand I’ve been played
6 Has anyone else dealt with heartbreak?
7 How are you supposed to get over someone
8 If you have to see them all the time?
9 15 years together and we drifted apart
10 I guess I’m still young being 33
11 None of my friends ever liked her
12 They tell me I can do better
13 That she wasn’t good to me
14 I’m not sure if I’m still in love with her
15 Or have a severe case of Stockholm syndrome
16 as well as a dash of codependency
17 We we’re together since 12th grade and 17 years old. Hey, this is post 17!
18 We have 2 kiddos together, so we’re working on coparenting
19 That’s why I see her all the time
20 She says she still is my best friend
21 So we still text each other all the time
22 I’ve told her I don’t want this
23 But she says it’s for the best for both of us
24 We had just bought a house 5 years ago, but only she is listed on the mortgage
25 Now I’m in my parents basement on an air mattress…le sigh
26 and 3 bedroom places for my son and daughter are $2k a month!!
27 I built my life around her and the kiddos
28 and don’t have a home to go home to after a hard day of work
29 I’ve also been trying to get into therapy
30 but everywhere is booked out months
31 and I’ve been waitlisted
32 I have a strong support system
33 and I’ve also stopped drinking
34 I’m just so absolutely and terribly lost
35 Everyone keeps saying to focus on me
36 and that’s exactly what I’ve been doing
37 but every day I miss her more
38 and this isn’t getting any easier
39 When is this going to get easier?
40 When am I supposed to start putting myself out there again?
41 Going to bed by yourself at night is so…
42 …depressing, cold, and lonely
43 I’ve offered couples counseling
44 but she’s done done
45 If you have any advice whatsoever
46 please let me know
47 I hope you’ve enjoyed these
48 I’m sure I’ll be okay
49 eventually
50 She dropped off the kids in a short dress last night, and said she was going out…ugh
item.dc:creator: AllOfTheShortUserNamesWereTaken

item.dc:creator: mfrybeasley

item.title: Just needed to vent
item.description: I witnessed a man hit a brick-encased mailbox at close to 100 mph. I knew he was dead the moment I stepped up to him but did CPR for close to 5 minutes until paramedics arrived. His eyes were open as I worked, almost looking at me. I don’t know what I’m feeling. Maybe it’s delayed shock. Time stood still as I knelt in the broken glass and plastic shards as I did what I’ve been trained to do but it was surreal. Sorry to ramble. I just thought it might help me to put it into words. Please don’t speed. Drive safely. -Josh
item.dc:creator: TheRussMartinShow

item.title: Really? How unlucky can I be?
item.description:
#chemo #chemotherapy
#babyboss #chemotherapy First time posting, been a lurker so many years. Tonight is hard, just felt like sharing. Stage 4 pancreatic cancer, palliative chemotherapy and alot goin on in my head… Just realised I won’t be here in 6 months. It’s hard tonight… Just a bit of love would be appreciated… nothing else… leaving behind my 4 year old babygirl is hard to deal with… always saw you guys comment like madmen/madwomen on shitposts… please prove me wrong and send love. ***Update*** An hour in and you guys delivered… made me cry like a baby. Bucket list is done and i’m workin on it. Wanna see an Opera, want to go eat at this really fancy restaurant in Montreal called Toqué, going to a VR place with friends, play in a big poker tournament, bring the little onw to the amusement park La ronde etc… got a bunch more stuff and workin on it, planning all these expenses ain’t easy at all but ill make it work! Sincerely you guys are amazing, didn’t expect so many comments and reading each and everyone of them makes me happy… thank you guys… ***Second Update*** For those who are curious, I got 2 bucket lists, a bullshit one which is : 1)Wsop poker tournament live 2)Cooking classes with the one and only Gordon 3) Tickets to tomorrowland 4) F18 jet ride 5) Private party with Martin Garrix 6) See the Taj Mahal, Pyramids or Maya temples 7) A trip to Scotland or Japan 8) Ocean fishing 9) see the Canadiens win another stanley cup 10) A carnivore plant. And then there’s the reasonnable bucket list that i’m workin on 1) Finish my half sleeve tatoo 2) VR with friends 3) Plan a golfing trip 4) Take 5 days off alone by myself 5) Take yoga classes 6) See an opera 7) Fancy restaurant in montreal called Toqué 8) MDMA 9) Go fishing locally 10) Go see the blue jays in TO 11) Learn to ski 12) Go karting in Mont Tremblant 13) That my five best friends write me a love letter. There you have it ! ***Before going to bed Update***The love you guys… I can’t stop crying… no jokes… so much love… I knew I had to do this… for those who asked, yes there’s a gofundme page to help, but in all honesty this is NOT the reason I created this post. I do not expect anything from it. https://gofund.me/a7382ac8 Also I do not have a mutation gene or they cannot find an alternative treatment as of now but more tests are being conducted as we speak… I know this seems stupid but there is other clinical treatments available, but far from home and very costly for me to do so…

item.title: Senators Marco Rubio and Steve Daines draw criticism for sharing screenshots of Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy as he addressed US lawmakers via Zoom on Saturday
item.description: A US house of reps member from Minnesota, Dean Phillips said Ukrainian Ambassador told them not to share anything about the meeting online for security reasons.

item.title: It's all about the small victories
item.dc:creator: zMike70z

item.title: It is what it is.
item.description:
Cancer patients have made headway towards “right to die laws”. Hopefully other conditions will be granted a chance at dignity at the end.
Truly, it doesn’t
Shoutout to my friends that don’t try to “fix” me.
A thick layer cake?.
First 30 year of my life, and I have never missed it.
Bring out the guillotines and give me a call.
I recently moved, it was a simple affair.
I found out that I am allergic to “woo-hoos” the past few months there.
Advertising sucks. End of discussion.
I do believe this is important for being intellectually honest, at least.
What it’s like to have crisis councilor intermission. The situation gets worse, then you struggle with debt for a long time.
Once again, leadership issues.
Keep meaning to try this. Several specialists and years of trying to no avail. I have been on various sleeping pills for 17 years now.
Happened not too long ago in line at Walgreens in downtown Nashville.
My feelings in song form, while I had Covid a few weeks ago.
He is my Bunshine, my only Bunshine

item.dc:creator: Threefall

item.title: ADHD Awareness Dump
item.description:
Too many hobbies, been and gone
Ah, Executive Dysfunction. It is the bane of my existence
Too many times
I eat my boredom. This is not a good thing.
This is rare, but when hyper-focus occurs in the right place, nothing can stop me!
Except this. I zoned out in the car earlier. Not too bad, except I’m driving!
I have too many dice sets.
How do you do basic addition?
ADD is no more. ADHD it is!
I once made it to 32 items. Couldn’t feel my arms when I got back to the car!
My Dad has ADHD. Undiagnosed. I got it from him.
Too much laundry!
And Rejection Sensitivity Dysphoria. And Body Focused Repetitive Behaviour. So many co-morbidities!
Needs routine. Routine is boring!
Oh! I saw Whatsisface the other day at… The place with the thing! You know, right?
I have done all of these things in the past week. I’m in my 40s!
Not always a squirrel! FP Edit: Thanks everyone! I’ve finally made it to the Front Page! If more than 2-3 of these ring true to you, please ask your doctor for a referral to a psychiatrist for an ADHD diagnosis. It might not be ADHD, but either way, you’ll find out!
item.dc:creator: WeeJubya
